name: node-write-file-atomic
title: node-write-file-atomic
summary: Write files in an atomic fashion with configurable ownership
description:
Write files in an atomic fashion with configurable ownership
This is an extension for node's `fs.writeFile` that makes its operation atomic
and allows you set ownership (uid/gid of the file).
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-write-file-atomic because Write files in an atomic fashion with configurable ownership.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-write-file-atomic as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-write-file-atomic with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-write-file-atomic --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
